title: barista grind tree — structured output
description: Top-level document emitted by `barista grind tree --format json`. Encodes the resolved dependency tree rooted at the project's pom. Coordinate strings use Maven `group:artifact:version` notation (`gA:gV:gC`); classifier/type when present are appended per Maven convention.

command.description: Discriminator. Always the literal string `grind-tree` for documents produced by `barista grind tree`.

root-coord.description: Coordinate of the root node — the project being resolved — in `group:artifact:version` form (optionally followed by `:classifier` and `:type`).

nodes.description: Flat list of nodes in the resolved tree. Order is unspecified; consumers should index by `coord` and walk via the `children` arrays starting from `root-coord`.

coord.description: Coordinate of this node in `group:artifact:version` form.

scope.description: Maven scope of this dependency relative to its parent (e.g. `compile`, `runtime`, `test`, `provided`, `import`).

depth.description: Depth in the dependency tree from `root-coord` (the root itself is depth 0).

children.description: Coordinates of direct children of this node, in resolution order.
